Hello hello everyone!!! I got into Morimens a few days ago and i was recently struggling to build a decent team, so I was wondering if I could get some help!! These are the awakeners i currently have
I have been borrowing Gelot
Is there a better borrow?
gelot is a risky borrow. If you're still new and lack the stats, she can end up killing the team with her self damage if you don't know how to handle it
a good support castor, tawil, kathigu-ra will be safer
clementine can also carry you hard if she is built right on the borrow
i see thanks will try!
Out if everyone Astr said, I would say Kath can carry the best for you.
Tawil is a tad complex if you dont understand her Wings and Exalt Burst and Castor is a bit complex with the Retain = Shield.
And balancing Onyx Plumes.

I agree with Astr that Cantena is… not that good of a borrow…. As strong as she is, she really requires good supports to allow her to:
1. Burst One Turn Boss
2. Accelerate Fast Enough
3. Survive to that Turn
Clem in most cases won’t be able to carry, unless its a true endgame Clem.
Kath is you’re best bet.

She does 50k+ with her exalt along with her buffs so that's why i suggested
since if i draw my cards i just die

Kath, when at E3 and built decently, can keep you alive with big shield, build her own burst turn via Fiamma, and Burst via Hyperflare. Hence, she can feed herself the best and is the easiest to play. The only mechanic you will need to understand is Fiamma bounces to other cards with a max of 3 Fiamma per card. Fiamma further increases shield, damage, aliemus, and STR gained from said card for each stack. Aliemus gain is amazing as it fuels her Exalt to further cycle and funnel more Kath cards with Fiamma into your hand.
It’s just… rare to find one. You’re in no shape or form wrong <:M_satisfy:1400771690321154110>

What wods should i use and should i try and get horla's sig wod?
(I might not reply instantly since i need to get ready for my classes thx in advance for any advice)

Read the talents of the Awakeners and see if they benefit from a certain main stat(Sigil Yield, Damage Amplification). Then proceed to determine if that matters or not, the talent/passive. Dps mainly run Crit Rate/Crit Dmg/Dmg Amp. Supports mainly run Skey/Aliemus. Of course, some  Awakeners don’t follow that cause of how they function, and their passive.

If you’re in Arc 1, always run “Frenzy” and “Gluttony”, as these two Brown/R wheels makes Arc 1, alottttt easier.  “Frenzy” gives you the ability to buy cursed relics, and as you should know by now, they are broken. “Gluttony” allows you to forgo a Orison for a Percentage of Max Hp increase, which makes White Tentacle Stance Shield and Crimsum Furnace, shield/heal more. Even if you’re not running Aequor or Caro realm, the max Hp will still help with surviving and healing more Hp to work with a Junctions.
Horla’s Sig is very nice for Dps due to the increase Crit Rate and Crit Dmg, and other stats. Not so much for Horla herself.
Hey folks, new player here for about 2 weeks in. Any recommendation of what kind of team/playstyle that I can use with this roster?
What part of the game are you in? Early on, it's best to just experiment and figure out what playstyles and mechanics you like the most.
You hit your first potential challenge at the end of chapter 5 and ideally by them will have an idea of what type of team you enjoy and can work toward building that.

Counter team is great, until it isn't. Arc 2 really nerfed counter and if you relied heavily on it, it's going to be a rude awakening.

That's not a terrible team. I'd maybe swap out Ogier or Lotan for Aegis since her stun ability is really one of the strongest moves in the game.

Right now Castor is currently on banner. In like 4 days Tawil will rerun. And then next month we'll have genesis murphy. Hell Yea! I would recommend testing other limited Awakeners in the “Trial” tab at the pulling screen on the bottom left. This will give you feel on ALL Awakeners. Allowing you to understand Awakeners, craft Teams, and see if you really wanna stick with Grandpa in the end.

(Try out via the “Support” button on the middle right) <:happy:1356053849894420683>
The generic endgame carry salv comp is e2+ Salv, e2 Thais, Horla and Winkle + the chapter 7 posse

Revolves around casting Salvador's 2-cost as often as possible to scale since he scales with furnace gained during the entire combat. Horla is there for the grief stance, which increases healing done, which also improves Salvador's furnace generation and makes the health-->furnace conversion of his 2-cost a lot better
Why is Winkle in there? Assume me a big nub knowledge wise
She's an aliemus battery and more Aliemus for thais means more Salv 2-cost casts
(She is also a bit of a flex but there really isn't anyone who is better for that spot)
basically three aliemus batteries tbh
Horla doesn't generate much since you are exclusively in sad stance but every little bit helps

Chat what does uvhash typically want Battery or crits?
battery I think

you need aliemus support on the team, usually thais and then another aliemus char like winkle, horla... or i suppose some people do use pickman.

Uvhash should have 100%+ critrate after rouse just from your build. If that's not the case, you need to add more critrate substats to your covenant. critdmg from teammates is of course good, but not usually as good as final damage multipliers because uvhash already has a lot of inherent crit damage. for example, if you have jenkin supporting on an uvhash team uvhash can hit ~500% crit damage, but it still doesn't give as much of a damage buff as horla wrath or clementine exalt.

So for Salva and Thais Caro comp would I hold onto Salva 2-cost until I can copy it with Thais and then just wait to re-do it or do I just throw all 3 and hope to pull a new one before next Thais ult?
after chapter 7 you get a posse that lets you copy a card from you hand so you almost always hold it
Situation can be slightly different early on tho since duping it is not as consistent
but generally: whatever lets you cast 2-cost as often as possible is the best course of action
Awesome! Yeah I've only just arrived at chapter 5, been having lots of fun but was unsure if its better to retain an original or just throw it in too. Thank you :3
lategame on you can cast like 5 2-costs a turn sometimes
just converting hp into furnace and then shielding or putting it back into HP (or both), the furnace into damage is mostly just a finisher
Yeah I've mostly been using dedication (lose some hp and get crimson furnace) until furnace is full then the big bang to empty it
At my current stage (which I assume is only because its early but still, its fun) its enough to 1-turn most bosses if I get lucky
Super enjoyable

Yeah later on you will get into boss fights that lasts longer so you really can't afford to spend the furnace into nukes, much better to shield or turn it back into hp so you can use it for more furnace (to get scaling)
To get more furnace? <:Surprised:664527579302068225>
Salv scales with every single point of furnace gained in the entire combat, not just what is in the pool right now
Oh wow
Today I learned
Thank you sm Omena <:Foxy_Heart:857729883379728395> thats rlly good to know
so the optimal salv strat if you have the space for it is converting HP into furnace a bunch, using that furnace to heal you back up and then converting into furnace again
rinse and repeat
and eventually your 2-cost will just start doing more and more damage until everything dies

<@495650534905085962> I have been enlightened. <:U_power:1400771817659957258> Thanks to, <@337981494641295360> , I have reread Salvadoor’s “End of Suffering”, and I didnt read the fine print. It does have infinite scaling…. <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775> as does his “Strike”. The gameplay loop is still the same. With further research and discussion(from Aurora and Tea), the comps can be Caecus and Goliath for BIG CON Max Health which Salva scales off of with Crimson Furnace, or Horla and Winkle were in this case, Winkle feeds Aliemus to Thais and keeps duplicating the 2 Cost “End of Suffering” Original Copy, while Horla stays in Sad Stance. The Horla Sad Stance(Defend Stance) enhances healing and shielding, which works on Salvador 2 Cost “End of Suffering” and his E2 “Defends” and his 3 Cost(I believe<:pray:1400771650064089112>). Anyways, just wanted to clear up that misinformation. <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
